page_content:
Prerequisite: BUFN610.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUFN660, BUFN726, BUFN761 or BUFN773. Formerly: BUFN773.

BUFN730 Advanced Financial Modeling and Equity Analysis (2 Credits) Provides in-depth analysis of public equities, with a focus on financial statement analysis, financial forecasting and ultimately valuation. Students will apply the primary valuation techniques used in industry to estimate market values for equities. Additionally, students learn how to stress test their financial models and interpret outcomes.
